subtitle: Senior Product & Platform Leader -- Roadmap Ownership | CMS Architecture | Mission-Driven Tech
summary_text: Senior product and platform leader with 8 years of platform roadmap ownership and 14 years at a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit. At Money Management International I owned the multi-year roadmap for the homegrown ERP/CRM, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) and operating an explicit multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders. CMS background runs from architecting a proprietary commercial-grade content management platform at DMLCo -- supporting dozens of production sites for 17 years -- through technical sponsorship for several iterations of expanding Sitecore functionality at MMI. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation. Comfortable owning a roadmap through influence rather than line authority -- consensus, earned-veto, and explicit prioritization frameworks have been the operating model throughout.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, automation-vs-AI distinction, and practitioner workflow on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- auditable across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; capability envisioning, technical-debt-as-roadmap-input, and platform-product extensibility were first-class roadmap inputs.

Built and operated a multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governing sprint-over-sprint decisions; the equity mechanism was the contested-but-load-bearing piece that prevented any single function from dominating or being ignored.

Architected platform extensibility from single-product tool to variable multi-product financial platform -- each product carrying its own matrix of requirements, fees, and support; platform-product thinking applied to a regulated nonprofit context.

Technology sponsor through several iterations of expanding Sitecore functionality at MMI scale -- content authoring workflows, structured content models, multi-site deployment, integration with the homegrown platform.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% year-over-year.
Operational reliability outcome of the platform's core function: daily movement of client funds at 100% accuracy year over year across the post-platform-recovery period.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the organization across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.

Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade content management platform in ColdFusion -- supporting dozens of content-driven client sites at production scale, frequently serving as clients' first digital presence.
Direct client engagement, scope definition, and full delivery lifecycle -- discovery, content modeling, architecture, build, launch, ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

skills.items: Platform Roadmap, Multi-Factor Prioritization, Capability Envisioning, Multi-Stakeholder Governance, Platform Extensibility
Sitecore (Technical Sponsor), Custom CMS Architecture (ColdFusion), Content Authoring Workflows, Structured Content Models, Multi-Site Deployment
Cross-Functional Data Definitions, Power BI, Tableau, SQL / T-SQL, Data Warehousing, DataRobot (Production ML)
Agile / SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Scope/Schedule/Budget Management
ColdFusion (CMS origin), JavaScript, Python, Node.js, Git / GitHub, Playwright
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
